text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's time for the summer training camp, an
opportunity for one to show their skills as class
representative. Sakura Bakushin O goes all out in
her training, ready to be a perfect role model
during her time there.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thus begins Sakura Bakushin O's passionate
summer, the mantle of the fastest runner awaits
her at the Sprinters Stakes!
